rationale: Redundant with S-0002-09, which covers the same target-vs-simulated tuning-curve scoring plus the envelope-compliance framing (DSI 0.7-0.85, peak 40-80 Hz, null < 10 Hz, HWHM 60-90 deg). S-0002-09 is implemented by t0012_tuning_curve_scoring_loss_library. Keeping both would risk two parallel library implementations with drift; the envelope-based framing in S-0002-09 is strictly more useful for optimisation tasks than the residual-only framing in S-0004-03.
